endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/securityContacts
endpoints.description: Security contact configurations for the subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/securityContacts/{securityContactName}
endpoints.description: Security contact configurations for the subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECURITYCONTACTNAME}} with a real securitycontactname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/securityContacts/{securityContactName}
endpoints.description: Security contact configurations for the subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECURITYCONTACTNAME}} with a real securitycontactname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/securityContacts/{securityContactName}
endpoints.description: Security contact configurations for the subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECURITYCONTACTNAME}} with a real securitycontactname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/securityContacts/{securityContactName}
